name: Coastal Settlement
description: Rich fishing waters and busy trade ports. Vulnerable to water-based disasters.
flavor_text: The salt air carries opportunity... and danger.

name: Mountain Stronghold
description: Abundant minerals and natural defenses. Harsh terrain limits farming.
flavor_text: The peaks stand eternal, but the earth stirs beneath...

name: Open Plains
description: Fertile farmland stretches to the horizon. Exposed to raiders and storms.
flavor_text: The land provides, but there is nowhere to hide...

name: Deep Forest
description: Timber-rich woods with natural shelter. Fire is an ever-present threat.
flavor_text: Ancient trees whisper secrets, but their shadows hide peril...

name: Desert Oasis
description: Ancient knowledge preserved in the sands. Trade caravans bring gold. Food is scarce.
flavor_text: The desert remembers everything. It forgives nothing...
